*Initialize self. See help(type(self)) for accurate signature.*

We need to make sure that all clients start from the same initial model
at round 0. So, we need to save the initial model once at the server
side and load it at each client during its initialization.

### Aggregation

The aggegation for `fedavg` is defined as:

*m*<sub>*t*</sub> ← ∑<sub>*k* ∈ *S*<sub>*t*</sub></sub>*n*<sub>*k*</sub>
$$W\_{global}^{(t + 1)} \leftarrow \sum\_{k \in S_t} \frac{n_k}{m_t} w_k^{(t + 1)}$$

where *S*<sub>*t*</sub> is the set of active clients at communication
round *t*, *n*<sub>*k*</sub> is the number of samples at client *k*, and
*w*<sub>*k*</sub><sup>(*t*)</sup> is the model parameters of client *k*
after local training at round *t*.
